message: fix: Remove npm cache from workflow (no package-lock.json)

files.patch:
@@ -49,8 +49,6 @@ jobs:
         uses: actions/setup-node@v4
         with:
           node-version: '18'
-          cache: 'npm'
-          cache-dependency-path: npm/package-lock.json
 
       - name: Setup Rust
         uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
